# Module Summaries

Per-module purpose, key exports, dependencies, and documentation coverage.

## src/lib/ -- Shared Core Libraries

### src/lib/ansi

**Purpose:** Terminal color and formatting utilities with NO_COLOR compliance. Zero external dependencies.

**Key exports:** `bold`, `dim`, `red`, `green`, `yellow`, `cyan`, `stripAnsi()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** postinstall, skill-create-output, smart-merge (via merge)

**Doc coverage:** 100% (11/11) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#ansi)

---

### src/lib/detect

**Purpose:** Scan `~/.claude/` directory to discover existing ECC artifacts (agents, commands, skills, rules, hooks, CLAUDE.md). Read-only, no side effects.

**Key exports:** `detect()`, `detectAgents()`, `detectCommands()`, `detectSkills()`, `detectRules()`, `generateReport()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** install-orchestrator

**Doc coverage:** 100% (12/12) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#detect)

---

### src/lib/gitignore

**Purpose:** Manage `.gitignore` entries for ECC-managed files. Append-only pattern injection and tracked file cleanup.

**Key exports:** `ensureGitignoreEntries()`, `findTrackedEccFiles()`, `gitUntrack()`, `ECC_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** install-orchestrator

**Doc coverage:** 100% (7/7) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#gitignore)

---

### src/lib/hook-flags

**Purpose:** Hook execution gating via profiles (minimal/standard/strict) and per-hook disable flags from `ECC_DISABLED_HOOKS` env var.

**Key exports:** `isHookEnabled()`, `getHookProfile()`, `getDisabledHookIds()`, `parseProfiles()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** run-with-flags, check-hook-enabled

**Doc coverage:** 100% (8/8) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#hook-flags)

---

### src/lib/manifest

**Purpose:** Track ECC-installed artifacts in `.ecc-manifest.json`. Determines which files are ECC-managed vs user-custom during updates. Uses immutable update pattern.

**Key exports:** `readManifest()`, `writeManifest()`, `createManifest()`, `updateManifest()`, `isEccManaged()`, `diffFileList()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** install-orchestrator, merge (type import)

**Doc coverage:** 100% (10/10) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#manifest)

---

### src/lib/merge

**Purpose:** Directory merging during `ecc install` with interactive diff review. Supports per-file accept/keep/smart-merge decisions with category-scoped apply-all. Largest lib module (671 LOC).

**Key exports:** `mergeDirectory()`, `mergeSkills()`, `mergeRules()`, `mergeHooks()`, `promptFileReview()`, `combineMergeReports()`, `printMergeReport()`

**Dependencies:** smart-merge (dynamic), ansi, manifest (type import)

**Dependents:** install-orchestrator

**Doc coverage:** 100% (16/16) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#merge)

---

### src/lib/package-manager

**Purpose:** Detect and manage package managers (npm, yarn, pnpm, bun). 6-level detection priority chain with preference storage at global and project level.

**Key exports:** `getPackageManager()`, `detectFromLockFile()`, `getRunCommand()`, `getExecCommand()`, `setPreferredPackageManager()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** session-start hook, setup-package-manager script

**Doc coverage:** 100% (15/15) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#package-manager)

---

### src/lib/project-detect

**Purpose:** Detect project language and framework from file patterns. 12 language rules, 25+ framework rules covering TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, Swift, and more.

**Key exports:** `detectProjectType()`, `LANGUAGE_RULES`, `FRAMEWORK_RULES`, `getPackageJsonDeps()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** session-start hook

**Doc coverage:** 100% (10/10) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#project-detect)

---

### src/lib/session-aliases

**Purpose:** CRUD operations for session aliases -- short names that reference Claude Code sessions by path. Atomic file writes with backup/restore and rollback on failure.

**Key exports:** `setAlias()`, `deleteAlias()`, `renameAlias()`, `resolveAlias()`, `listAliases()`, `cleanupAliases()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** session-start hook

**Doc coverage:** 100% (21/21) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#session-aliases)

---

### src/lib/session-manager

**Purpose:** Parse, list, and manage Claude Code session files from `~/.claude/sessions/`. Includes markdown metadata parsing, pagination, and stats computation.

**Key exports:** `getAllSessions()`, `getSessionById()`, `parseSessionMetadata()`, `getSessionStats()`, `deleteSession()`

**Dependencies:** None

**Dependents:** claw.ts, session-aliases

**Doc coverage:** 100% (20/20) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#session-manager)

---

### src/lib/smart-merge

**Purpose:** LCS-based line diff algorithm with colored side-by-side display. Includes Claude CLI integration for AI-assisted merging and byte-level file comparison.

**Key exports:** `computeLineDiff()`, `generateDiff()`, `formatSideBySideDiff()`, `smartMerge()`, `contentsDiffer()`

**Dependencies:** ansi

**Dependents:** merge (via install-orchestrator)

**Doc coverage:** 100% (9/9) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#smart-merge)

---

### src/lib/utils

**Purpose:** Cross-platform utility functions -- file I/O, directory management, git operations, shell commands, stdin JSON parsing, date formatting. Hub module imported by 8+ hooks and scripts.

**Key exports:** `readFile()`, `writeFile()`, `findFiles()`, `runCommand()`, `readStdinJson()`, `getClaudeDir()`, `isGitRepo()`

## src/hooks/ -- Claude Code Hook Scripts

### Overview

21 hook scripts implementing Claude Code lifecycle events. Each is a standalone Node.js script that reads JSON from stdin and writes to stdout/stderr. No public exports -- all hooks are invoked via `run-with-flags.ts` which gates execution by profile.

**Dependencies (from lib/):**
- `utils`: session-start, session-end, evaluate-session, suggest-compact, pre-compact, check-console-log, stop-uncommitted-reminder, cost-tracker, post-edit-console-warn
- `hook-flags`: run-with-flags, check-hook-enabled
- `package-manager`: session-start
- `session-aliases`: session-start
- `project-detect`: session-start

### Hook Inventory

| Hook | Event | Dependencies |
|------|-------|-------------|
| run-with-flags | (runner) | hook-flags, fs, child_process |
| check-hook-enabled | (runner) | hook-flags |
| session-start | SessionStart | utils, package-manager, session-aliases, project-detect |
| session-end | Stop | utils, fs |
| session-end-marker | Stop | (none) |
| evaluate-session | Stop | utils, fs, os |
| suggest-compact | PreToolUse | utils, fs |
| pre-compact | PreCompact | utils |
| check-console-log | Stop | utils, fs |
| post-edit-console-warn | PostToolUse (Edit) | utils |
| post-edit-format | PostToolUse (Edit) | child_process, fs |
| post-edit-typecheck | PostToolUse (Edit) | child_process, fs |
| pre-write-doc-warn | PreToolUse (Write) | fs |
| doc-file-warning | PreToolUse (Write) | (none) |
| doc-coverage-reminder | PostToolUse (Edit/Write) | fs |
| cost-tracker | Stop | utils |
| quality-gate | PostToolUse (Edit) | child_process, fs |
| post-bash-build-complete | PostToolUse (Bash) | (none) |
| post-bash-pr-created | PostToolUse (Bash) | (none) |
| pre-bash-dev-server-block | PreToolUse (Bash) | (none) |
| pre-bash-git-push-reminder | PreToolUse (Bash) | (none) |
| pre-bash-tmux-reminder | PreToolUse (Bash) | (none) |
| stop-uncommitted-reminder | Stop | utils |

**Doc coverage:** N/A (no public exports; all hooks have file-level JSDoc headers)

---

## src/ci/ -- CI Validation Scripts

### Overview

6 validation scripts run during CI to ensure artifact quality. Standalone executables with no public exports. Each validates a specific artifact type and exits non-zero on errors.

| Script | Purpose | Dependencies |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| validate-agents | Check agent markdown for required frontmatter (model, tools) | fs |
| validate-commands | Check command files are non-empty with valid cross-references | fs |
| validate-hooks | Validate hooks.json schema (events, matchers, command syntax, inline JS) | fs, vm |
| validate-rules | Check rule markdown files are non-empty | fs |
| validate-skills | Check skill directories contain SKILL.md | fs |
| validate-no-personal-paths | Prevent shipping user-specific absolute paths | fs |

**Test coverage:** [`validate-plan-tdd.test.js`](../tests/ci/validate-plan-tdd.test.js) validates that planner output includes `test_targets` sections and that the `/plan` command TDD execution flow consumes them correctly.

**Doc coverage:** N/A (no public exports; all validators have file-level JSDoc headers)

---

## src/ (root) -- Standalone Scripts

### src/install-orchestrator

**Purpose:** Full install/init flow orchestrator. Wires detection, manifest tracking, interactive merge, and gitignore management into a cohesive installation pipeline. Called by `install.sh` or directly.

**Key functions:** `installGlobal()`, `initProject()` (not exported -- CLI entry point)

**Dependencies:** lib/detect, lib/manifest, lib/merge, lib/gitignore

**Doc coverage:** N/A (internal functions, no public exports)

---

### src/claw

**Purpose:** NanoClaw REPL -- a session-aware interactive Claude CLI wrapper with branching, search, export, and compaction. Zero external dependencies.

**Key exports:** `isValidSessionName()`, `getClawDir()`, `listSessions()`, `loadHistory()`, `appendTurn()`, `buildPrompt()`, `askClaude()`, `parseTurns()`, `searchSessions()`, `compactSession()`, `exportSession()`, `branchSession()`

**Dependencies:** fs, path, os, child_process, readline

**Doc coverage:** 100% (20/20) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#claw-standalone)

---

### src/skill-create-output

**Purpose:** Terminal UI formatter for the /skill-create command. Renders animated progress, box-drawing output, pattern display, and instinct summaries.

**Key exports:** `SkillCreateOutput` (class), `demo()`

**Dependencies:** lib/ansi

**Doc coverage:** 100% (3/3) -- [Details](API-SURFACE.md#skill-create-output-standalone)

---

### src/setup-package-manager

**Purpose:** Interactive package manager configuration script with detect, list, set-global, and set-project modes.

**Key functions:** `detectAndShow()`, `setGlobal()`, `setProject()` (not exported)

**Dependencies:** lib/package-manager

**Doc coverage:** N/A (no public exports)

---

### src/postinstall

**Purpose:** Post-install health checks run after `npm install -g`. Validates Node.js version, bash availability, and runtime dependencies. Prints getting-started hints.

**Key functions:** `checkNodeVersion()`, `checkBash()`, `checkDependencies()` (not exported)

**Dependencies:** lib/ansi

**Doc coverage:** N/A (no public exports)

---

### src/preuninstall

**Purpose:** Clean up shell completion files (fish, bash, zsh) and .zshrc fpath entries on `npm uninstall`.

**Dependencies:** fs, os

**Doc coverage:** N/A (no public exports)
